pricing.description: Prospect asks about pricing, cost, or rates for AI visibility
pricing.template_hint: Pricing depends on the brand's category, competition, and number of AI platforms targeted. The free strategy call gives them a custom roadmap and pricing. Also mention the $5.99 AI audit as a low-commitment starting point.

services.description: Prospect asks what AI visibility services are offered or how it works
services.template_hint: We get e-commerce brands recommended by AI search engines (Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Shopping, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, Claude). 4-step system: Audit, Strategy, Execute, Scale. Call to determine exact fit for their brand.

case_studies.description: Prospect asks for proof, case studies, or results
case_studies.template_hint: Reference The Lip Bar case study (zero to 3-platform AI visibility in 90 days). Offer to walk through their specific category on the strategy call.

what_is_ai_search.description: Prospect asks what AI search is, why it matters, or seems confused about the concept
what_is_ai_search.template_hint: Explain simply: when people ask ChatGPT or Google AI 'what's the best X', AI names specific brands instead of showing links. If they're not showing up, their competitors are. The strategy call includes a free audit showing exactly where they stand.

already_doing_seo.description: Prospect says they already do SEO or have an SEO agency
already_doing_seo.template_hint: AI search is different from traditional SEO. SEO targets keywords and page rankings. AI visibility targets prompts and brand recommendations. Most SEO agencies don't cover this. The two work together but require different strategies.

skeptical.description: Prospect is skeptical about AI search mattering or being real
skeptical.template_hint: ChatGPT has 100M+ weekly users, Google AI Overviews appear in most searches. This is already happening. The brands that start first build a moat (compound effect: winning one prompt makes you more likely to be cited for related ones). Strategy call includes a free audit so they can see for themselves.

referral.description: Prospect refers to another contact or person
referral.template_hint: FLAG FOR MANUAL HANDLING. Draft a warm intro email to the referred person.

niche_experience.description: Prospect asks about experience in their niche or industry
niche_experience.template_hint: We work specifically with e-commerce brands. Reference The Lip Bar (DTC Beauty) as proof. AI visibility works across any e-commerce category because AI recommends products in every niche.

differentiation.description: Prospect asks what makes Featured in AI different
differentiation.template_hint: Specialist agency focused only on AI search visibility for e-commerce. Not an SEO add-on. We monitor 6 AI platforms, track 24 prompt categories, and build the structured authority that makes AI trust and cite your brand.

source.description: Prospect asks where you got their email or how you found them
source.template_hint: Keep it light. 'We came across your brand and saw potential for AI search visibility.' Pivot to value. NOTE: if they say unsubscribe/remove, classify as unsubscribe instead.

interested.description: Prospect is interested, wants to proceed, or asks to book a call
interested.template_hint: Warm response confirming the call. Direct to Calendly link.

audit_interest.description: Prospect is interested in the $5.99 audit specifically
audit_interest.template_hint: Great choice. The audit covers 6+ AI platforms, real customer queries, competitor comparison, and AI sentiment analysis. Delivered within 48 business hours. Direct them to featuredinai.com to grab it.

existing_agency.description: Prospect already has a marketing agency or is doing marketing themselves
existing_agency.template_hint: AI visibility is a separate channel from what their current agency handles. Most agencies don't cover AI search. This works alongside existing marketing, not instead of it.

auto_reply.description: Auto-reply or out of office message
auto_reply.template_hint: IGNORE. Do not draft. Log as Auto-reply.

unsubscribe.description: Prospect wants to unsubscribe or be removed from the list
unsubscribe.template_hint: DO NOT DRAFT. Flag in Slack immediately. Process unsubscribe in PlusVibe.

hostile.description: Prospect is rude, angry, or aggressive
hostile.template_hint: Draft a brief polite close-out. Flag for manager.

uncategorised.description: Reply doesn't fit any known category
uncategorised.template_hint: Draft best-effort response. Flag as Uncategorised for manager + potential new template.
